subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-01-22 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Today very sad news has been received. He [Mirza Abu'l-Fazl] was indeed a very glorious personage... How humble and meek he was! We tried our best to persuade him to keep a servant
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز یک خبر بسیار محزنی رسید خلیل محزن فی الحقیقه بسیار شخص جلیلی بود از جمیع جهات نادر بود
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @high station of learning, @eulogies; reminiscences
